AccessDeniedPage.description: You do not have permission to access this resource. Please contact your administrator if you believe this is an mistake.

dialog.description: Select a locale to add to your project. Once added, you can translate terms in this locale.

toast.addFailed: Failed to add locale. Please try again.

toast.noLocaleSelected: Please select a locale to add.

tooltip.limitReached: You have reached the maximum number of locales allowed for this project. ({current}/{limit})

AdminLocalesPage.description: View and manage all locales in the system.

deleteLocale.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the locale "{displayName}" ({id}) and all associated translations in all projects. Please be certain.
deleteLocale.title: Are you absolutely sure?

empty.description: There have been no locales created yet. Click the button below to create your first locale.
empty.title: No locales Yet

input.searchPlaceholder: Search locales by name, language, region, code or ID...

editLocale.description: Update the details of the locale. Changes to the locale will be reflected in all projects that use this locale.
editLocale.title: Edit {displayName} ({id})

tableHeader.enabledHover: Indicates whether the locale can be selected by users in their projects.

toast.deleteFailed: Failed to delete locale. Please try again.
toast.deleteSuccess: The locale "{displayName}" ({id}) has been successfully deleted.

tooltip.noPermissionDelete: You don't have permission to delete locales.

AdminPlansPage.description: View and manage all plans in the system.
AdminPlansPage.title: Plans

deletePlan.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the plan "{displayName}" ({id}) and remove the association with this plan from all projects that are currently using it. Please be certain.
deletePlan.title: Are you absolutely sure?

empty.description: There have been no plans created yet. Click the button below to create your first plan.
empty.title: No Plans Yet

input.searchPlaceholder: Search plans by name, description or ID...

noDefaultPlanAlert.description: There is currently no default plan set. This means that new projects can't be created because every project must be associated with a plan.
noDefaultPlanAlert.title: No Default Plan Set

editPlan.description: Update the details of the plan. Changes to the plan will be reflected in all projects that are associated with this plan.

editPlan.labelsLimitPlaceholder: Enter a labels limit for the plan

editPlan.membersLimitPlaceholder: Enter a members limit for the plan
editPlan.termsLimitPlaceholder: Enter a terms limit for the plan
editPlan.title: Edit {displayName} ({id})

tableHeader.defaultHover: The default plan is automatically associated with new projects that are created without a specified plan.

toast.alreadyDefault: The plan "{displayName}" ({id}) is already set as the default plan.

toast.deleteSuccess: The plan "{displayName}" ({id}) has been successfully deleted.
toast.setDefaultFailed: Failed to set default plan. Please try again.
toast.setDefaultSuccess: The plan "{displayName}" ({id}) has been successfully set as the default plan.
toast.updateFailed: Failed to update plan. Please try again.
toast.updateSuccess: The plan "{displayName}" ({id}) has been successfully updated.

tooltip.noPermissionDelete: You don't have permission to delete plans.
tooltip.noPermissionUpdate: You don't have permission to update plans.

AdminUsersPage.description: View and manage all users in the system.
AdminUsersPage.title: Users

alert.editingSelfDescription: You are currently editing your own account. Be cautious when making changes to your own role or banned status, as it may affect your access to the system. If you accidentally remove your own admin privileges or ban yourself, you may lose access to the admin dashboard and will need to contact another administrator to restore your access.

deleteUser.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the user "{name}" ({id}) and all associated data, including their projects. Please be certain.
deleteUser.title: Are you absolutely sure?

input.searchPlaceholder: Search users by name, email or ID...

editUser.banExpiresPlaceholder: Enter the date when the ban expires
editUser.banReasonPlaceholder: Enter a reason for the ban
editUser.description: Update the details of the user, including their role and banned status. Changes to the user's role may affect their permissions and access to certain features in the system.

editUser.namePlaceholder: Enter a name for the user
editUser.passwordPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep the current password
editUser.projectsLimitPlaceholder: Enter a projects limit for the user

toast.banExpiresInvalid: Ban expires must be a valid date in the future. Please enter a valid date and try again.

toast.deleteSuccess: The user "{name}" ({id}) has been successfully deleted.

toast.nameAndEmailRequired: Name and email are required fields. Please fill them in and try again.
toast.noChanges: No changes were made to the user.
toast.projectsLimitEmpty: Projects limit cannot be empty. Please enter a valid number and try again.
toast.projectsLimitInvalid: Projects limit must be a positive integer. Please enter a valid number and try again.

toast.updatePasswordFailed: Failed to update user password. Please try again.
toast.updateRoleFailed: Failed to update user role. Please try again.
